'''Kaj Nedmak''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] who served as one of the atmosphere guides during the [[Battle of Ylesia]].

In later life, Kaj fell in love with [[Celia Durasha]], a smuggler from [[Lankashiir]], and ran several missions with her for underworld kingpins [[Bwahl]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and [[Rass M'Guy]]. When a smuggling deal went sour, however, Bwahl hired the bounty hunter [[Thune (bounty hunter)|Thune]] to capture them. Chasing them to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], Thune almost managed to do just that, and nearly killed Kaj in the process, but the smugglers turned the tables on her and escaped, stealing both her ship and her droid, [[U-THR]].
